pi_items.source: Verified against setup_dbeaver.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Direct inspection of Chinook database via sqlite3 - actual table names use title case (e.g., Album not albums, InvoiceLine not invoice_items)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Artist in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Genre in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM InvoiceLine in Chinook database (table is named InvoiceLine, not invoice_items)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MediaType in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PlaylistTrack in Chinook database (table is named PlaylistTrack, not playlist_track)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Playlist in Chinook database
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track in Chinook database

pi_items.verified_value: Public Chinook database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database (real, not synthetic)
pi_items.source: Analysis of setup_dbeaver.sh script and comments indicating data based on real iTunes Library
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'
PRAGMA foreign_key_list() analysis on all tables
PRAGMA index_list() analysis on all tables (excluding implicit PKs)

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available dataset based on iTunes Library data, hosted at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. It contains 11 tables with verified row counts: Album (347), Artist (275), Customer (59), Employee (8), Genre (25), InvoiceLine (2240), Invoice (412), MediaType (5), PlaylistTrack (8715), Playlist (18), and Track (3503). All expected row counts match actual database counts. However, the metadata claims lowercase table names ('albums', 'artists', 'invoice_items', 'playlist_track') while the actual database uses title case names ('Album', 'Artist', 'InvoiceLine', 'PlaylistTrack'). The database contains 11 total foreign keys distributed across tables (Album: 1 FK, Customer: 1 FK, Employee: 1 FK, Invoice: 1 FK, InvoiceLine: 2 FKs, PlaylistTrack: 2 FKs, Track: 3 FKs) and 11 explicitly created indexes supporting foreign key relationships.
